PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: FUNCTION_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(FUNCTION)('function')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('apache')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('bool2http')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Variant')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Boolean')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFunctionReturnTypeImpl(FUNCTION_RETURN_TYPE)
      PsiElement(>>)('>>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
        PsiElement(CASE)('case')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetExpressionFalseImpl(EXPRESSION_FALSE)
                PsiElement(FALSE)('false')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetExpressionUndefImpl(EXPRESSION_UNDEF)
                PsiElement(UNDEF)('undef')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(?i:false)/')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Off'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetExpressionTrueImpl(EXPRESSION_TRUE)
                PsiElement(TRUE)('true')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                PsiElement(REGEX)('/(?i:true)/')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''On'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
            PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
              PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('arg')
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
